hero.heading:
Code. Learn.
Level Up.
hero.description: Master Python, JavaScript, HTML/CSS, and C++ with structured courses, AI-powered tutoring, and hands-on coding exercises — all in a cyberpunk terminal interface.

sections.howItWorksTitle:
Learn by doing.
From day one.
sections.featuresTitle: Built for how you actually learn.
sections.ctaSub: Join thousands of learners mastering Python, JavaScript, HTML/CSS, and C++.

structured.title: Structured Courses
structured.desc: Guided paths from zero to production-ready, with placement tests to skip what you already know.

aiTutor.title: AI Tutor
aiTutor.desc: Get contextual hints from a Claude-powered tutor when you're stuck — never the full solution.

gamified.title: Gamified Learning
gamified.desc: Earn XP, climb the leaderboard, and unlock achievements as you progress through each course.

projects.title: Real Projects
projects.desc: Build portfolio-ready projects with automated grading and personalized AI feedback.

faqItems: Do I need prior coding experience?
How does the AI tutor work?
What if I finish all the content?
How accurate is the placement test?
faqAnswers: No. EduVerse starts from absolute basics in every language track. If you already know some, take a placement test to skip ahead.
When you get stuck, click "Ask AI". A Claude-powered tutor reads your code and the lesson context, then nudges you with hints — never the full solution.
Yes. Your progress is saved per course. Jump between HTML/CSS, JavaScript, Python, and C++ whenever you want.
New lessons and projects are added regularly. Follow our changelog and suggest topics you'd like to see.
Not yet. EduVerse is designed for desktop browsers with a real code editor. Mobile is on the roadmap.
The adaptive test adjusts difficulty based on your answers. Most learners find it places them within 1–2 lessons of their actual level.

leaderboard.empty: No users yet. Complete a lesson to claim rank #1.

result.advanced: You're highly skilled — we'll challenge you with advanced concepts.
